open-pdf-get-page-count.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
open-pdf-get-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save with Default Settings
open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using a FileStream and then save it to another file using Aspose.Pdf with default options.

open-password-protected-pdf.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Providing a Password
open-password-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to attempt opening an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf and catch the InvalidPasswordException when no password is supplied.

save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a new file on disk.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while preserving metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with Color Profiles
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3.description: Demonstrates converting an existing PDF to PDF/X‑3 compliance using Aspose.Pdf while preserving embedded color profiles, then saving the output file.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-restrict-.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-restrict-.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying user and owner passwords, setting permissions to allow only content extraction (disabling printing), and saving the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, removing its encryption, and saving an unprotected copy using Aspose.Pdf.

add-blank-page-to-pdf.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
add-blank-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, insert a new blank page at the end, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF
insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf, extract a page from the source PDF, and insert it into a specific position of the target PDF using the Pages.Insert method.

remove-third-page-from-pdf.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
remove-third-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page, and save the modified document.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Shows how to split a multi‑page PDF into separate one‑page PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and the Pages.Add method.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b compliance with Aspose.Pdf, and write the converted files and logs to an output directory.

encrypt-pdf-stream.title: Encrypt PDF from Stream and Write to Stream
encrypt-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from an input stream, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and saving the secured PDF to an output stream.

create-pdfx3-multi-page.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
create-pdfx3-multi-page.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add three pages with simple text, convert the document to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and save the resulting file.

load-pdf-byte-array-update-title.title: Load PDF from Byte Array and Update Title Metadata
load-pdf-byte-array-update-title.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading it from a byte array, changing its title metadata, and saving the result.

save-pdf-to-xps-without-embedded-fonts.title: Save PDF to XPS without Embedding Fonts
save-pdf-to-xps-without-embedded-fonts.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and save it as XPS while disabling TrueType font embedding using XpsSaveOptions.

incremental-pdf-update-append-pages.title: Incremental PDF Update with Page Append
incremental-pdf-update-append-pages.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF with a read/write stream, adding a blank page, optionally appending pages from another PDF, and saving the document incrementally to preserve the original content.

compress-pdf-default-settings.title: Compress PDF Using Default Settings and Compare File Size
compress-pdf-default-settings.description: Loads a PDF, saves it with Aspose.Pdf's default compression, then reports the original and compressed file sizes and the percentage reduction.

export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by loading the source document, extracting each page, and saving it as a separate file.

convert-pdf-to-version-1-4-from-memoryst.title: Convert PDF to Version 1.4 from MemoryStream
convert-pdf-to-version-1-4-from-memoryst.description: The example loads a PDF file into a MemoryStream, creates an Aspose.Pdf Document from it, converts the document to PDF version 1.4, and saves the result to disk.

encrypt-pdf-form-filling-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Permission Only
encrypt-pdf-form-filling-permission.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, allowing only form filling while disabling content extraction and other actions.

create-pdfa1b-document-with-text.title: Create PDF/A‑1b Document with Text Paragraph
create-pdfa1b-document-with-text.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a text paragraph to the first page, converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saving the result.

rotate-second-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-second-page-90-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF, rotate the second page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF using a FileInfo object, modify its Author metadata, and save the changes back to the original file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-password.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords and saving the protected copies to a separate directory.

batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF/A-1b format while preserving the original structure and embedded fonts, and save the resulting file.

compress-pdf-high-compression.title: Compress PDF with High Compression Level
compress-pdf-high-compression.description: Loads a PDF, applies full optimization (high compression) using OptimizationOptions, saves it with PdfSaveOptions, and compares the original and compressed file sizes.

download-pdf-from-url.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally
download-pdf-from-url.description: Demonstrates fetching a PDF via a WebRequest stream, loading it with Aspose.Pdf, and saving it to a local file.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-no-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes256-no-printing.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with no permissions (including printing), save the encrypted file, and verify that the document is encrypted using Aspose.Pdf.

change-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-up.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Update
change-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-up.description: Loads an existing PDF, converts it to PDF version 1.5 while logging conversion issues, and saves it using incremental update mode.

change-pdf-passwords.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords with Aspose.Pdf
change-pdf-passwords.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using the owner password, change the user and owner passwords, and save the PDF with the new credentials.

split-pdf-at-page-ten.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
split-pdf-at-page-ten.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract pages 1‑10 and the remaining pages into separate documents, and save each part as a new PDF file.

set-pdf-document-title-verify.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
set-pdf-document-title-verify.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its document title metadata, save the file, and then reopen it to confirm the title was persisted.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Font Embedding
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (which embeds any missing fonts), and saving the resulting archival‑ready file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with CMYK Color Space
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while forcing all colors to CMYK using an ICC profile, and save the resulting file.

batch-convert-pdfa.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Log
batch-convert-pdfa.description: Creates sample PDFs, converts each to PDF/A‑1b format, saves conversion logs, and records results in a CSV file.

rotate-pdf-page-byte-array.title: Rotate PDF Page from Byte Array
rotate-pdf-page-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, rotates the third page by 180 degrees, and saves the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only (Restrict Editing and Copying)
encrypt-pdf-user-password-only.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply user‑only password protection with AES‑256 encryption, and set permissions to allow printing while disabling editing and copying.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-disable-copying.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Disable Copying
encrypt-pdf-rc4-disable-copying.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, revoke all copy permissions, and programmatically verify the security settings by opening and decrypting the document.

encrypt-pdf-allow-form-fill.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
encrypt-pdf-allow-form-fill.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set permissions so only form filling is allowed, encrypt it using AES‑256, and save the protected file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-folders.title: Split PDF into Single‑Page Files and Store in Separate Folders
split-pdf-into-single-page-folders.description: Demonstrates how to load a large PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract each page into its own PDF document, and save each page into a dedicated folder.

update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.description: Loads a PDF file, replaces its Author metadata with the current user name, and saves the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit RC4 with Aspose.Pdf, then compares the original and encrypted file sizes to confirm the encrypted file is slightly larger.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Reads a JSON configuration file containing multiple PDF encryption jobs, applies user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the encrypted files while logging success or failure.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 Preserving ICC Profiles
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/X-3 with Aspose.Pdf while retaining existing ICC color profiles and logging conversion messages.

batch-convert-pdfa-compression.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with Compression
batch-convert-pdfa-compression.description: Creates sample PDFs, converts each to PDF/A‑1b format with resource optimization for high compression, and prints a summary report.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a custom XMP metadata block, attaching it to the document, and saving the file while preserving existing metadata.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only an owner password, granting full access to the owner while restricting all user permissions.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Loads a PDF document, rotates each page by 180 degrees, and saves the rotated version to a new file.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-high-quality-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with AES-128 and High-Quality Printing Permission
encrypt-pdf-aes128-high-quality-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128, set permissions for high‑quality printing, and verify the encryption by decrypting the document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v3.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v3.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging any conversion errors, and saves the compliant document.

batch-pdf-encrypt-with-secure-log.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with File‑Name Derived Passwords and Secure Log
batch-pdf-encrypt-with-secure-log.description: The example encrypts all PDF files in a folder using passwords generated from each file name, saves the encrypted PDFs to an output folder, and records the passwords in a DPAPI‑protected log file.

split-pdf-into-sections.title: Split PDF into Sections Using Page Ranges
split-pdf-into-sections.description: Shows how to read a configuration file with named page ranges and split a source PDF into separate PDF files for each section using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-form-fill-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Form‑Fill Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-with-form-fill-permission.description: The example loads an existing PDF, applies password protection with a user and owner password, restricts permissions to only allow form filling, and saves the encrypted document using AES‑256 encryption.

set-pdf-metadata-author-title-subject.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
set-pdf-metadata-author-title-subject.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets its document information fields (Author, Title, Subject) using Aspose.Pdf, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the metadata.
